title: Hero Pro Mod
description: This mod adds new tiers for tools and armor such as Copper, Steel, Sapphire, Emerald, Ruby, Iridium, Enderite and more!
body:
## Very Important note!
#### If you want to have a working Glowing Shield you need to download a specific modified version of lambdynamiclights from additional files under the newest version of my mod. It will not work with the default version. 
###### *I am redistributing modified version of lambdynamiclights which is in accordance to the law. LDL is created under MIT license just like my mod which allow you to do so. All credits to the creator of this mod. For now I will not update this mod to 1.20.2 because of many reasons. Future update to newer versions aren't in plans for now which doesn't mean it won't get one. For now I will stick with 1.20.1.*

# Welcome to my Mod that expands Minecraft tiers of gameplay!
### Have you ever wished to make Emerald Tools or Armor? Perhaps you wanted to have ruby's when you learned they were in Minecraft files? Or maybe you are just bored after you get Netherite Armor and Tools and just stop playing? This mod is exactly for you!

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibRAyzT8/images/6252f69a4dfdb7150f99395461ffd9744eceb86c.png)

## Hero Pro Mod ads:
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibRAyzT8/images/2dde75798012d0e4682aacf79063566ca645b922.png)
```
Copper, Steel, Sapphire, Emerald, Ruby, Iridium, Enderite and Rainbow Armor and Tools sets.
Emerald, Ruby, Iridium, Enderite, Rainbow Upgrade templates.
Steel, Sapphire, Ruby, Iridium, Enderite, Rainbow Block.
Sapphire, Ruby, Iridium, Enderite and Crystal Ores.
Different ore apple types.
Cheese, Pizza, Chocolate
Mortar
3 types of katana sword (from Minecraft Dungeons) with 6 tiers of upgrade

Enderite based on Enderite Mod by pitti11
```
---
### You can dig up katana types from suspicious sand in desert temples (pyramids), suspicious gravel in cold ocean ruins and ancient ruins. You will get tier 0 form it. From here you can upgrade them from Emerald till Rainbow tier

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibRAyzT8/images/7a9ede8bf328b29cbed80e02b5068733c8f9f889.png)
---
### Glowing shield
![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibRAyzT8/images/8958fda2b61c839c873dc6c8979fd3f54cddc4a4.png)
---
## Important note
### In this mod some vanilla craftings are tweaked such as creating Netherite items. First you need to upgrade diamonds to emeralds then to Netherite. Here is the order and quality of ore tiers.

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibRAyzT8/images/d3d1ed05c6db4983d798d3376534cfefe810e27d.png)

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ibRAyzT8/images/7a0505d1607057bea02ce00cb635b47d6b934f93.png)

## Future plans:
```
Rebalance: apples, ore distribution and more
Rainbow Crystal Tools and Armor with special effects
Custom Banana Tree with bananas and Apple trees
Ore detectors with 3 tiers for easier search of all Ores depending on the tier.
Penguins and other type of mobs? maybe?
Support for beacon blocks (Sapphire, Ruby, Iridium)
and more!
```
*This mod is still in development so the bugs might appear or the balance may feel a little bit off.*

*Feel free to report anything to me on discord: herorcpro*
